Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
2 
CREDENTIAL01 
LABEL: 
Academic or Professional Credential 1 — for Part D Prescribers 
DESCRIPTION: The degree or academic credential for the prescriber. This variable is one of five possible credentials or 
academic degrees in the source data. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: CREDENTIAL01 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
HCIdea™ Prescriber Database 
VALUES: 
(e.g., MD, DO, RN, DPM) 
COMMENT:
